ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of bank account (e.g., savings, current) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for account recovery */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question for account recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., withdrawal, transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Transaction amount */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "atm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ATM machine where the transaction was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was initiated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the transaction (e.g., mobile, web) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES transaction_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_atm_id FOREIGN KEY ("atm_id") REFERENCES atm_machines ("atm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Withdrawal, Transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, blocked) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was last updated */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Unique account number for each account */,
  "account_opening_balance" REAL /* Initial balance when the account was opened */,
  "account_currency" TEXT /* Currency type of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_messages" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that failed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error encountered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the error message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the error message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_messages_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atm_machines" (
  "atm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ATM */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the ATM */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ATM (e.g., operational, out of service) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ATM machine was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ATM machine information was last updated */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance or service */,
  "service_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next service is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the ATM */,
  "atm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ATM being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ATM was accessed */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions performed during the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was initiated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for accessing the ATM (e.g., mobile, web) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_atm_id FOREIGN KEY ("atm_id") REFERENCES atm_machines ("atm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being logged */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., credit, debit) */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Amount of money changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the change occurred */,
  "atm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ATM machine where the transaction was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_atm_id FOREIGN KEY ("atm_id") REFERENCES atm_machines ("atm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type (e.g., Savings, Current) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atm_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "atm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ATM the setting applies to */,
  "max_withdrawal_limit" REAL /* Maximum withdrawal limit for the ATM */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Transaction fee applied to each transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ATM setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ATM setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atm_settings_atm_id FOREIGN KEY ("atm_id") REFERENCES atm_machines ("atm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the limit */,
  "max_daily_limit" REAL /* Maximum amount that can be withdrawn daily */,
  "max_monthly_limit" REAL /* Maximum amount that can be withdrawn monthly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_limits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
